'''Midani''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] near [[Andasala]]. It was a favored destination of hunters.

Midani was a notable transshipment point in the [[Spice/Legends|spice]] trade.<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
